tagline: AI & Full-Stack Engineer · LLMs · Agentic Systems · React
description: MS Computer Science grad specializing in Generative AI, LLM development, and full-stack engineering.

roles.detailed: AI Engineer · Full-Stack Developer · LLM Systems · Agentic AI

bio: AI and Full-Stack Engineer with hands-on experience building production-grade Generative AI systems and scalable web applications. Specialized in LLM application development, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent frameworks using LangChain and CrewAI. Experienced across the full stack with React, Python, FastAPI, and cloud platforms. Previously contributed to enterprise data engineering at LTI Mindtree and built a Generative AI knowledge assistant at Community Dream Foundation. MS in Computer Science from California State University, Long Beach.

bullets: Built a Generative AI knowledge assistant using LangChain and GPT models, enabling natural language Q&A over internal documents.
Designed and deployed a RAG pipeline with FAISS vector store, improving information retrieval accuracy significantly.
Developed a Streamlit-based frontend for non-technical users to interact with the AI system in real time.
experience.desc: Built a production-grade Generative AI knowledge assistant using LangChain, GPT models, and RAG pipelines with FAISS vector search.

bullets: Developed and optimized data models, views, and stored procedures in SAP HANA for enterprise clients.
Automated data reporting pipelines, reducing manual processing effort by 30%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable data engineering solutions on tight deadlines.
experience.desc: Enterprise data engineering using SAP HANA. Built optimized data models and automated reporting pipelines for large-scale clients.

projects.title: AI Document Q&A Chatbot
projects.subtitle: RAG-based Document Intelligence
projects.desc: A RAG-based chatbot that lets users upload PDFs and ask natural language questions. Built with LangChain, FAISS vector store, and GPT-3.5-Turbo. Streamlit interface enables real-time document Q&A with semantic search and context-aware answers.

projects.title: Text-to-SQL AI Interface
projects.subtitle: Natural Language to Database Queries
projects.desc: Natural language to SQL query interface supporting multiple LLMs including GPT-4 and Mistral AI. Users type plain English questions and get live database results. Built with LangChain, SQLAlchemy, and a Streamlit frontend connected to MySQL.

projects.title: AI Resume Tailoring Assistant
projects.subtitle: Multi-Agent Resume Optimization
projects.desc: A multi-agent system built with CrewAI that analyzes job descriptions and automatically tailors resumes using GPT-4 and live web research via SerperDev. Agents collaborate to identify keyword gaps, rewrite bullet points, and optimize for ATS systems.
